blocking_findings.summary: The governance plan still showed LFA-P17.5 as pending during the review run, so the reviewer treated the required review gate as incomplete.
Sharded review could not cross-check behavior equivalence across all extracted modules from source-level evidence.
Sharded review could not independently confirm that every original public export remains available after extraction.

public_export_check.method: Compare documented original export surface with dynamic import keys from current src/workflow/headless-cli-orchestrator.js.

focused_gates.command: node --check src/workflow/headless-cli-orchestrator.js && node --check src/workflow/headless-orchestrator-utils.js && node --check src/workflow/headless-child-worker-runtime.js && node --check src/workflow/headless-provider-executor.js && node --check src/workflow/headless-main-orchestrator-cycle.js && node --check src/workflow/headless-main-orchestrator-loop.js

node tools/run-with-node18.mjs --test test/headless-cli-orchestrator.test.js test/headless-cli-orchestrator-cli-basic.test.js test/headless-cli-orchestrator-cli-service-actions.test.js test/headless-cli-orchestrator-cli-service-loop.test.js test/headless-cli-loop-continuation.test.js test/headless-process-hardening.test.js test/autonomous-scheduler-loop.test.js test/workbench-projection.test.js
